title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Yamato, Unknown person #6, Ulti, Unknown person #7, Big Mom as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They've fallen into the under ground!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Were the pirates from before just a decoy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will not let you put a hand on them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This party is really dangerous!! Did Kaido die?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Waaaah! These guys have trans formed in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't they the Yakuza that should be arrested in Udon?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hurry and attack Kaido while he's weak luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They are the real open retainers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How dare you do that before?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day to become Kozukii Oden' has come!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't get it are you an idiot?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is terrible! Your father has been attacked

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there are lots of enemies on the floor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't care if my father dies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi's delusions that no one believed are starting to be tied together....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rumors about a shadow of a person in Oden's castle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Good job gathering this many soldiers

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Interesting you guys hid behind the shadows of the...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't expect you to side with pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But the pirates will betray you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When they realize they're going to lose, they'll turn their backs on you and run away

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've already broken strawhat Luffy's nose once!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the man who will someday stand on the top of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even if we die he's here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's our promise with our Lord!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 59 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
